meta.title: Network Synergy Driver Catalogue
meta.context: Telkom (Operator A) + PLN IconPlus / ICONNET (Operator B) fixed-network synergy assessment. Levers describe where consolidating ICONNET onto Telkom (or shared) infrastructure avoids capex/opex.
meta.counting_rule: Only count a synergy when the asset, cost or service dependency is proven removable/avoidable. Gross -> Net (less cost-to-achieve) -> Bankable (x certainty).

definitions.gross_synergy: Theoretical value before cost-to-achieve and execution risk.
definitions.cost_to_achieve: One-time cost to realize the synergy (design, migration, decommission, testing).
definitions.certainty_score: Weighted score over data quality, field validation, feasibility, cost avoidability, timing.
definitions.bankable_synergy: Net synergy multiplied by certainty score.
definitions.risk_exposure: Net synergy not yet bankable, plus execution downside.

levers.opportunity: Cancel or defer planned FTTH build where the other network already passes the homes.
levers.calculation_logic: Avoided HP x cost per HP, net of wholesale or migration cost.
levers.primary_data_required: Homes passed by geography; build plan; unit capex; serviceability.

levers.relevant_asset: Aerial routes, poles, closures, distribution cables
levers.opportunity: Reduce duplicate maintenance route-km after customers/services move.
levers.calculation_logic: Retired or avoided route-km x annual maintenance cost/km.
levers.primary_data_required: Route-km; maintenance spend; overlap by route; active services.
levers.notes: Do not count unless route can be removed from maintenance.

levers.relevant_asset: OLT chassis, shelves, PON cards, optics
levers.opportunity: Move ICONNET-served load into Telkom target OLT/PoP where capacity allows.
levers.calculation_logic: Retired assets x opex/unit + avoided refresh/expansion.
levers.primary_data_required: OLT inventory; PON utilization; ONT count; growth forecast.
levers.notes: Highest near-term bankability when inventory is strong.

levers.opportunity: Use compatible ICONNET equipment or spare cards to avoid new purchases.
levers.primary_data_required: Vendor/model; software; port density; card compatibility.

levers.opportunity: Avoid or defer refresh of platforms made redundant by consolidation.
levers.calculation_logic: Standalone refresh capex - target refresh capex - migration cost (use NPV).
levers.primary_data_required: 3-5 year capex plan; asset age; EoL/EoS; vendor roadmap.
levers.notes: Use NPV, not only annual run-rate.

levers.relevant_asset: L2 switches, OLT uplinks, trunks, NNIs
levers.opportunity: Migrate ICONNET PoP aggregation functions into Telkom PoPs.
levers.calculation_logic: Retired switches x opex + avoided upgrades + port/optic reuse.
levers.primary_data_required: Switch inventory; uplinks; VLAN/QinQ; traffic utilization.
levers.notes: Aligned to ICONNET PoPs moving to Telkom PoPs.

levers.relevant_asset: Leased lines, waves, metro rings, uplinks
levers.opportunity: Remove duplicate transport once ICONNET traffic is rehomed.
levers.calculation_logic: Terminated circuits x recurring cost + avoided port/optic upgrades.
levers.primary_data_required: Circuit inventory; bills; endpoints; term dates; utilization.
levers.notes: Separate transport savings from switch/router savings.

levers.relevant_asset: PE routers, VRFs, BGP peers, route policies
levers.opportunity: Move ICONNET PE functions into Telkom PE estate or shared edge.
levers.calculation_logic: Retired PE opex + avoided line-card/optic upgrades - target cost.
levers.primary_data_required: PE inventory; configs; VRFs; BGP peers; traffic; Telkom headroom.
levers.notes: Requires strong logical audit before cutover.

levers.opportunity: Consolidate ICONNET broadband sessions onto Telkom service edge.
levers.calculation_logic: Retired sessions/capacity x license/opex + avoided expansion.
levers.primary_data_required: Sessions; throughput; license basis; subscriber/service map.
levers.notes: Do not count until license avoidability is proven.

levers.opportunity: Reduce legacy access platforms where customers can migrate.
levers.calculation_logic: Retired MSAN opex + avoided refresh - customer migration cost.
levers.primary_data_required: MSAN inventory; active lines; voice dependencies; refresh plan.
levers.notes: Do not bundle with BNG unless same cost base.

levers.relevant_asset: NOC processes, OSS/NMS tools, alarms, inventory
levers.opportunity: Move from duplicate monitoring to a common operating process.
levers.calculation_logic: Avoided tools/facility cost + productivity gain - integration cost.
levers.primary_data_required: NOC locations; tool inventory; licenses; alarm volumes.
levers.notes: Value often comes from MTTR reduction.

levers.opportunity: Reduce overlapping field coverage and improve dispatch productivity.
levers.calculation_logic: Reducible FTE/contract spend x loaded cost + truck-roll reduction.
levers.primary_data_required: FTE/contractor roster; geography; workload; dispatch data.

levers.lever: Reduce faults, MTTR and blast radius
levers.relevant_asset: Process KPIs, route redundancy, dispatch, spares
levers.opportunity: Improve reliability through better topology, monitoring, spares.
levers.calculation_logic: Reduced faults x cost/fault + churn/SLA/penalty reduction.
levers.primary_data_required: Fault tickets; MTTR; outage logs; affected subs; root cause.
levers.notes: Use as KPI target even if not monetized initially.

levers.opportunity: Use combined scale to improve pricing and reduce duplicate support.
levers.calculation_logic: Addressable spend x achievable discount + duplicate support removal.
levers.primary_data_required: Vendor spend; contracts; renewal dates; volumes; SKUs.
levers.notes: Avoid double-counting support already counted in asset rows.
